1,Multiple AI-Agents (Voting-Based),[Rationale A1],,1,,"Based on the system configuration, there are five clients with CPU values [5,5,5,3,3]. The Client Selector is activated to mitigate the Straggler effect caused by the low-CPU clients (CPU=3). The threshold is set to 4, ensuring that only the three clients with CPU=5 are selected, as this is the smallest safe threshold that keeps at least two clients active (three clients have CPU>4). The Message Compressor is kept OFF due to insufficient evidence of communication bottleneck and potential overhead for small models. The Heterogeneous Data Handler remains OFF because there is no clear evidence of non-IID effects impacting model performance, and the previous rounds show stable F1 scores. This decision aims to optimize Total Round Time and Training Time by excluding weaker clients, while maintaining model diversity and avoiding unnecessary overhead.
CS=ON
